12.reason: [The loop should iterate over vertices (i < v), not edges (i < e). This causes incorrect adjacency checks.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The loop should iterate over vertices (i < v), not edges (i < e). This causes incorrect adjacency checks.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop bound should be 'v' (number of vertices), not 'e' (number of edges). This causes incorrect adjacency checks.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop bound should be 'v' (number of vertices), not 'e' (number of edges). This causes incorrect adjacency checks.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop bound should be 'v' (number of vertices), not 'e' (number of edges). This causes incorrect adjacency checks.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop bound should be 'v' (number of vertices), not 'e' (number of edges). This causes incorrect adjacency checks.]

23.reason: [Should use queue[front] instead of 'front' as the current vertex index. Using 'front' accesses wrong row in adjacency matrix.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Should use queue[front] instead of 'front' as the current vertex index. Using 'front' accesses wrong row in adjacency matrix.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  ['front' is an index into the queue, not a vertex label. Should use 'queue[front]' as the current vertex.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  ['front' is an index into the queue, not a vertex label. Should use 'queue[front]' as the current vertex.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Should use 'queue[front]' instead of 'front' as the current vertex index. Using 'front' accesses wrong row in adjacency matrix.]
